title: Nerfed Keep Inventory
description: Adds small consequences for dying with keepInventory enabled.
body:
# Nerfed Keep Inventory
Ever thought the vanilla keep inventory gamerule was a bit _too_ forgiving?

This data pack adds small punishments for dying, whilst avoiding being as extreme as regular Minecraft with keepInventory disabled.

Effects after respawning:
- Briefly receive the hunger effect, usually **losing about half of the hunger bar**.
- **Lose some XP** on death, with **the amount lost increasing at higher levels** before death.
- The remaining XP after death can never be higher than level 30.

Additionally, loading the data pack will automatically enable keep inventory.
